MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Nasir Patel, plaintiff in pro per.
James F. Rusk, Esq.appearing on limited scope representation for defendant Christopher D. Farabee, who is also present.

This cause comes on regularly for settlement conference. Settlement discussions held. The case settled. The parties enter into a signed Stipulation for Entry of Judgment and Dismissal of Action, which is then filed. Settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for premises located at 1040 Folsom Street, #1, San Francisco, CA. Trial date vacated.

JPT Paul Perdue, Clerk Clark Banayad, not reported (218)
